steps.title: Identify the locational purpose
steps.content: The transition must pinpoint where the speakers are located—in the Upper West Side neighborhood of Manhattan. It needs to serve as a place-marking transition from the general location to the specific one.

steps.title: Apply the locational transition
steps.content:
”There” functions as a place marker: “There in the borough's Upper West Side neighborhood” points to the specific location within Manhattan where these speakers are found.

Likewise expresses similarity, Consequently indicates causation, and For example introduces an illustration—none establish a location.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
